steps.reason: Viewed screenshot: customer dashboard landing with UserMenu trigger showing 'Guest' (avatar + chevron, sidebar footer trigger area); no raw error text. page_url is base '/' and main_status 200 per row. Auth log contains required POST /api/v2/auth/refresh 401 followed by POST /api/v2/auth/anonymous 201, and the trace confirms that exact order (refresh 401 at monotonic 3523ms, anonymous 201 at 3847ms, both before the step-01 screenshot at 4501ms). console_errors contains exactly one entry, the allowlisted 'Failed to load resource ... 401' from the cold-load restore attempt; page_errors empty. DOM probe [data-testid=user-menu-trigger] present with text 'Guest', text_match true. interception_at_capture false.

Viewed screenshot: open user menu shows Guest identity ('Guest' + 'Signed in via Guest') and the anonymous 'Sign in with email' upsell item, plus Settings and Sign out; no session chip inside the menu, consistent with the WI-3 reality correction that the chip renders in the header trigger area rather than the menu. page_url '/', main_status 200. No additional auth_requests required and none recorded (trace shows zero auth calls between the menu click at 4607ms and the step-02 screenshot at 5013ms). console_errors and page_errors empty. DOM probe text=Sign in with email present. interception_at_capture false.

Viewed screenshot: same dashboard UI as step 01, UserMenu trigger still reads 'Guest' (focus-highlighted after reload). page_url '/', main_status 200. Auth log shows POST /api/v2/auth/refresh 200 and NO new anonymous 201; forbidden rule anonymous-201 max_count 1 holds (observed_count 1, pass true, and the raw trace contains exactly one anonymous 201 for the whole run). DOM probe user-menu-trigger 'Guest' text_match true. Trace-verified user_id equality: refresh 200 body user_id 4e7300f1-a4c9-47c1-b5b4-b0651b0f105c equals the anonymous 201 body user_id, and the refresh request carried the refresh_token cookie anon.4e7300f1-... minted by the 201.

trace_spot_check.note: Unzipped auth-guest.trace.zip and read 0-trace.network + 0-trace.trace raw. Reload boundary located at the page.reload call (monotonic 5080.885ms). Exactly one /api/v2/auth/* request after it: POST .../v1/api/v2/auth/refresh with status 200 at 5157.668ms; no POST /api/v2/auth/anonymous after the boundary (the sole anonymous 201 is at 3846.763ms, pre-reload). Response bodies WERE recoverable from trace resources/: anonymous 201 body user_id=4e7300f1-a4c9-47c1-b5b4-b0651b0f105c, refresh 200 body user_id=4e7300f1-a4c9-47c1-b5b4-b0651b0f105c - equal. Manifest auth_requests for this step (single refresh 200) matches the trace exactly; no divergence found.
